title: Newsroom
description: A collection of recent press releases, blogs, and other announcements from the Department of Energy.
text:
Media Inquiries:
The Office of Public Affairs works with national, state, local, and industry media to get timely, accurate information out to the public on the Department of Energy’s work. Contact us at (202) 586-4940 or DOENews@hq.doe.gov
